title: Avenlis Sandstrike
description: Avenlis SandStrike is a Python library and CLI for LLM red teaming. It manages adversarial prompts, targets, and sessions, runs automated security tests (local and API-based), and generates detailed, structured vulnerability and grading reports.

risk_maps: OWASP Top 10 Risks and Mitigations for LLM Apps 2025
